description: A patient is being transferred to another hospital, which needs access to the imaging studies performed at the current facility.

nodes.task_description: Identify the imaging studies that need to be shared.

expected_outcome.value: Technologist selects the relevant CT and X-ray exams.

nodes.task_description: Use the image sharing feature to send the studies to the other hospital's PACS system.

expected_outcome.value: The images are electronically pushed to the receiving facility.

nodes.task_description: Confirm that the receiving facility has acknowledged receipt of the images.

expected_outcome.value: A confirmation message is received, ensuring continuity of care.
